title: Windows Search
description: Learn to use Windows Search to quickly find apps and files.

steps.instruction: Open Windows Search by clicking the search icon (🔍) in the Taskbar, or by pressing Win+S.
steps.hint: The search icon is next to the Start button in the Taskbar. Click it, or press Win+S on your keyboard.

steps.instruction: Use Search to find and launch the Settings app. Type 'Settings' and click on it in the results.
steps.hint: Type 'Settings' in the search bar and click on the Settings app when it appears.
